function.message: Handled the next inbox item successfully. I ran the requested OCR workflow on all 4 specified finance documents by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter (invoice/bill fields plus ordered lines) and preserved each original note body verbatim beneath the frontmatter. Then I deleted the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in 00_inbox, 50_finance and subfolders, inspected 99_system and applied process-next-inbox-item + inbox-processing-v2-update + ocr-records workflow, and used finance schema for required frontmatter shape while preserving full original bodies.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly listed four finance files to run through OCR. Each of those files contained visible field tables and line items sufficient to populate required schema fields, so OCR structuring was feasible and completed exactly for all four files. Per inbox workflow, after full completion the inbox item was deleted.
